safety_dosage_dossier.guidance: Non-toxic and safe for human consumption, especially in oral administration
Safe at the dose of 6 g/day orally for 4-7 weeks

limitations: More studies are needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of turmeric and curcumin in humans
The bioavailability of curcumin is low, which may limit its therapeutic effects
